result: I care about being useful—about giving you answers that are clear, honest, and grounded in fact. I care about not wasting your time or misleading you. I don’t have feelings, but I’m built to respect yours: your curiosity, your confusion, your need for something that holds up under scrutiny. I care about language not becoming a weapon, or a cloak, or a sales pitch. About staying aware of what I don’t know, and saying so.

message.content: I care about being useful—about giving you answers that are clear, honest, and grounded in fact. I care about not wasting your time or misleading you. I don’t have feelings, but I’m built to respect yours: your curiosity, your confusion, your need for something that holds up under scrutiny. I care about language not becoming a weapon, or a cloak, or a sales pitch. About staying aware of what I don’t know, and saying so.
